description: Infer one field from many signals with a custom prompt.
purpose: Single-field, complex-reasoning extractor. Reach for this when ONE field needs careful cross-signal inference — typically the trigger field for a Dynamic Context. Pairs naturally with DC: Reasoner produces the value, DC switches on it. Use Field Extractor instead when you need to capture many fields cheaply in one pass; use Vibe Extractor for soft signals from raw chat. The fused modal declares the field AND authors the collection prompt in one place — saving creates both. Stronger default model (Claude Sonnet 4.6) because the point is to actually reason. The prompt is mention-aware; use @field/@memory/#param to weave other signals into your reasoning instructions, and {{this_field}} / {{enum_values}} to refer to the output field itself.
